leadText: The Medichamite (Japanese: チャーレムナイト Charemnite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Medicham to Mega Evolve into Mega Medicham.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Medicham , the Medichamite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Medicham if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Medichamite from Medicham. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Medicham, the Medichamite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Medicham when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Medicham will remain a Mega Medicham until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Medicham , the Medichamite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Medicham if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Medichamite from Medicham.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Medicham hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Medicham hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Medicham holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.
